name: Baked Apple Pancake
recipeIngredient: 2 Green apples (Granny Smith or Pippin), peeled, cored, and sliced medium thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, 1 1/2 tsp. sugar, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add beer and stir until smooth.
3. Beat in one egg yolk, then the other.
4. In a separate bowl, beat whites with 1 tbsp. sugar until they form peaks.
5. Fold into the batter.
6. Mix together the remaining sugar, light brown sugar, cinnamon, and lemon juice (reserving 2 tsp. of this mixture).
7. Squeeze lemon over the apples and toss with the sugar-cinnamon mixture until coated.
8. Heat butter and oil in a 9 to 10-inch oven-proof pan or skillet.
9. Pour in half of the batter and cover with all apples.
10. Pour in the rest of the batter.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven on the middle rack for 60 minutes, or until the apple pancake is puffed up and golden.
12. Remove from oven and loosen sides and bottom with a metal spatula.
13. Slide onto a hot plate.
14. Sprinkle with remaining sugar-cinnamon mixture.
15. Cut into wedges. Serves 2 generously.
